title: TwitchPops
description: The mod created by Lycanrock consists of a collection of Funko Pops of popular Twitch streamers. It is currently in beta, and more streamer figures are expected to be added over time. The mod is compatible with
body:
![Twitchpops](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a3d3579d278f60854acbcf9cdd951e109eaee5f.png)
The mod, created by LycanrockZM, consists of a collection of Funko Pops featuring popular Twitch streamers. It's currently in beta, and more streamers are expected to be added over time. The mod is compatible with servers that have the same mod installed, and feedback is welcome. It's also important to credit the author if you make any videos or posts about the mod.

Special thanks to: UmmaDraco and Abalon Community

All Twitch Pops: 53 Pops, and more coming soon...

Elmariana, Spreen, Karchez, aXoZer, DjMaRiiO, Biyin, Arigameplays, Carrera, Carola, Pol, Auronplay, Juan Guarnizo, Aroyitt, Mayichi, Ibai, Focus, Reborn, Tanizen, BarbeQ, BarcaGamer, Cristinini, Pato, Perxitaa, VioletaG, Imantado , DessT3, Destri, Komanche, Zorman, Ampeter, CoolifeGame, Genesis, Jabu, Deqiuv, Betra, Water, Akages, Rubius, Luzu, UmmaDraco, Krysha, Raccon, Lagger07,Cristinini Velada 2,Magmaboy,CapitanGato,StarVtuber,Rakkun,Emikukis ,F4LLO,JustNova, Tae_Gambito, Muffin (Sons of Tyria), Xeena_la_war (Sons of Tyria), El_TIger_Gamer,Noni, Edurnity
